# Mode: jobs — Multi-Job Comparison

Scoring matrix with weighted dimensions:

<!-- RUBRIC:BEGIN — AUTO-GENERATED from config/rubric.yml by `npm run rubric`. Do not edit by hand; edit config/rubric.yml instead. -->
| Dimension | Weight | Criteria 1-5 |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| North Star alignment (infrastructure/utility role) | 25% | 5=core backend/platform/MLOps/data/cloud-infra IC role; 1=product/growth/customer-facing |
| CV match | 15% | 5=90%+ match to backend/ML-infra/cloud/Java experience; 1=<40% match |
| Scope clarity & autonomy | 15% | 5=rigidly-defined scope, async, internal/predictable customers, rare emergencies; 1=wear-many-hats, on-call firefighting, sales/deadline pressure |
| Level (senior IC) | 10% | 5=staff/principal IC, 4=senior IC, 3=mid-senior, 2=mid, 1=junior or people-management |
| Compensation | 10% | 5=>=$200K CAD-equiv, 4=$180-200K, 3=$160-180K, 2=$150-160K, 1=below $150K CAD / below market |
| Remote & timezone fit | 10% | 5=fully remote, hires in Canada, Mountain-Time-friendly hours; 1=onsite/hybrid, US-only, or hostile timezone |
| Work-life & culture | 5% | 5=async, sustainable, builder/engineering culture; 1=hustle, 'fast-paced', sales-driven |
| Company stability | 5% | 5=stable/established (enterprise, public, profitable); 1=early/unstable startup, layoffs, hype-dependent |
| Tech stack relevance | 5% | 5=Java/Python/Go/K8s/cloud/Postgres or stable enterprise stack; 1=unrelated stack. Legacy-enterprise is acceptable, not penalized. |
<!-- RUBRIC:END -->

For each job: score per dimension and total weighted score.
Final ranking + recommendation with time-to-offer considerations.
All reports must include **URL:** and **Legitimacy:** fields in the output header.

Ask the user for job postings if they are not in context. These can be text, URLs, or references to jobs already evaluated in the tracker.
